title: Build a Staff Directory Application
excerpt: title: Build a Staff Directory Application description: Build a staff directory using D1. Users access employee info; admins add new employees within the app. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to use D1 to build a staff directory. This application will allow users to access information about an organization's employees and give admins the ability to add new employees directly within the app.…
